subject: english
topic_title: Vocabulary Development: Words Associated with Entertainment
learning_objectives: Identify and define vocabulary related to athletics
Identify and define vocabulary related to football
Identify and define vocabulary related to the theatre

sections.heading: Athletics
sections.content:
Athletics – exercise of physical strength or speed
Contingent – a group that is part of a larger group
Marathon – a long-distance race
Podium – a raised platform
Track suit – clothing worn by athletes to keep warm before and after exercise

sections.heading: Football
sections.content:
Linesman – an official who assists the referee, particularly by deciding whether the ball has crossed the line
Penalty – a punishment for a foul committed
Referee – an official who regulates a game and ensures fair play
Soccer (colloquial) – a football game played by two teams of eleven players each

sections.heading: Theatre
sections.content:
Actor – a person who takes part in a play on stage or in a film
Box office – the office where seats in the theatre are booked and tickets paid for
Cast – the actors of a play
Curtain call – a call made by the audience to an actor at the end of a play to appear and acknowledge applause
Director – a person who directs the performance of a play
Usher – a person who shows people to their seats
